output.summary: Train LoRA adapters on a frozen, seed-generated random backbone, storing only adapters plus seed and compressing them for 16MB submissions.
techniques: Freezes a large random backbone regenerated from seed, training only rank-16 LoRA adapters plus embeddings/norms
Serializes only trainable adapters and seed, applying int8+zlib compression to meet artifact limits
Splits optimizers with Muon for adapters and Adam for embeddings/control parameters
